lore.english:
Demon. She's an elf who lives deep in the forests of the Dmon Realm, but among her species she's one of the rare Dark Elves. She is quiet, but also curious and wants to know everything.

Usually, elves prefer not to interact with other species, but to explore the world, she was traveling through the Demon Realm. After getting chased by powerful demons, she was helped by the Taimanins and began cooperating with them.

Unlike the average elf, she wields strong magical powers using the energy of nature. With her skill "Cluster Ice Blaster", she can mix the energy of nature and demonic energy to create a chunk of ice and fire it from her staff.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Cluster Ice Blaster[-]
skills.description:
Forms ice crystals from the staff and fires them at the enemy.
Targets hit are inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:30102]%)[-] [&Freeze] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:30102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:30102] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Ice Laser[-]
skills.description:
Fires a powerful ice beam that pierces the enemy.
When attacking a [&Technique] type target, inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:30202]%)[-] [&Freeze] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:30202]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:30202] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Ice Fall[-]
skills.description:
Creates a large ice crystal and drops it on top of [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].
Targets hit are inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:30302]%)[-] [&Freeze] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:30302]%[-] chance.
If there are 3 or more [&DeBuff]s, inflicts [&Freeze] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:30303]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:30303] turn(s)
